2606.12106.title: MSUE: Multi-Modal Soccer Understanding Expert
2606.12106.paper_summary: This paper presents our solution to the 2026 SoccerNet VQA Challenge. We first develop a cost-effective data synthesis pipeline driven by a Vision-Language Model (VLM), which systematically restructures raw domain data into diverse VQA samples, including concise answers and long-form responses. Second, we propose MSUE, a multi-expert question answering architecture that employs a Large Language Model (LLM) to dynamically dispatch questions to text, image, and video experts. These experts are instantiated as a strong text baseline Gemini3-Flash, a fine-tuned Qwen3-VL, and an external knowledge base, respectively, working collaboratively to enhance VQA performance. MSUE achieves an accuracy of \textbf{0.95} on the challenge benchmark, securing third place in the leaderboard.
2606.12106.paper_summary_zh: 本論文提出了我們對2026年SoccerNet VQA挑戰賽的解決方案。<lb/>我們首先開發了一個由視覺-語言模型（VLM）驅動的成本效益數據合成管道，<lb/>該管道系統性地將原始領域數據重構為多樣的VQA樣本，包括簡潔的答案和長篇回應。<lb/>其次，我們提出了MSUE，一種多專家問答架構，<lb/>該架構利用大型語言模型（LLM）動態地將問題分派給文本、圖像和視頻專家。<lb/>這些專家分別被實例化為強大的文本基線Gemini3-Flash、微調的Qwen3-VL和外部知識庫，<lb/>共同協作以提升VQA性能。<lb/>MSUE在挑戰基準上達到了\textbf{0.95}的準確率，<lb/>在排行榜上獲得第三名。
2606.12106.author: Litao Li et.al.
2606.12106.authors: Litao Li, Yibo Yu, Yufeng Hu, Zhuo Yang, Jiali Wen, Yixin Chen, Yixi Zhou
